scripts.dev:electron: npm run build:electron && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://localhost:5173 electron dist-electron/electron/main.js
scripts.dev:desktop: concurrently --names "renderer,electron" --success "command-electron" --kill-others "npm run dev:renderer" "wait-on tcp:5173 && npm run dev:electron"
scripts.build: tsc -b && vite build && npm run build:electron
scripts.test:smoke: npm run build && vitest run tests/electron-smoke.test.ts
